expression: Top''/Bottom Board: {([Width]) - 2 * ([BoardThick])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Side Board: {([Height])} x {([Depth])-([BackBoardThick])} x {[BoardThick]} x 2pcs & Back Board: {([Width])} x {([Height])} x {([BackBoardThick])} x 1pcs
author: sheenhoong

remarks.zh: 计算柜体板材尺寸。[Width]、[Height]、[Depth] 是总尺寸，[BoardThick] 是顶部、底部和侧板的材料厚度，[BackBoardThick] 是背板的材料厚度。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.en: Calculates board sizes for a cabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] is total Measurement, [BoardThick] is Top, Bottom and Side Board material thickness, [BackBoardThick] is Background Board material thickness.
remarks.ms: Mengira saiz papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ialah ukuran keseluruhan, [BoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah dan Sisi, [BackBoardThick] ialah ketebalan bahan Papan Latar. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.id: Menghitung ukuran papan untuk kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] adalah ukuran total, [BoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Atas, Bawah, dan Samping, [BackBoardThick] adalah ketebalan bahan Papan Belakang. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.th: คำนวณขนาดแผ่นไม้สำหรับตู้ [Width], [Height],[Depth] คือขนาดรวม, [BoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านบน, ด้านล่าง, และด้านข้าง [BackBoardThick] คือความหนาของวัสดุแผ่นไม้ด้านหลัง (AI translated, please check)
remarks.vi: Tính kích thước tấm ván cho tủ. [Width], [Height],[Depth] là kích thước tổng thể, [BoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm phía trên, phía dưới và bên hông, [BackBoardThick] là độ dày vật liệu của tấm phía sau. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.tl: Kinakalkula ang mga sukat ng board para sa kabinet. [Width], [Height],[Depth] ay kabuuang Pagsukat, [BoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal ng Tuktok, Ibaba at Gilid na Board, [BackBoardThick] ay Kapal ng materyal ng Likod na Board. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.my: အိမ်သုံးကင်နက်ဘုတ်အတွက် ဘုတ်အရွယ်အစားများကိုတွက်ချက်သည်။ [Width], [Height],[Depth] သည်စုစုပေါင်းတိုင်းတာချက်ဖြစ်ပြီး၊ [BoardThick] သည်ထိပ်၊ အောက်နှင့် ဘေးဘုတ်ပစ္စည်း၏အထူ၊ [BackBoardThick] သည်နောက်ဘုတ်ပစ္စည်း၏အထူဖြစ်သည်။ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.km: គណនា​ខ្នាត​បន្ទះ​សម្រាប់​ទូ​។ [Width], [Height],[Depth] គឺ​ជា​ទំហំ​សរុប។ [BoardThick] គឺជា​កម្រាស់​នៃ​សម្ភារៈ​បន្ទះ​ផ្នែកលើ ផ្នែកក្រោម និង​​ផ្នែក​ជាន់។ [BackBoardThick] គឺ​ជា​កម្រាស់​នៃ​សម្ភារៈ​សម្រាប់​ផ្នែកខាងក្រោយ។ (AI translated, please check)
remarks.lo: ຄິດໄລ່ຂະຫນາດແຜ່ນສໍາລັບຕູ້. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ແມ່ນຂະຫນາດທັງຫມົດ, [BoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງວັດສະດຸທຽມ, ລາດດານໃຕ້ ແລະດ້ານຄຽງ; [BackBoardThick] ແມ່ນຄວາມໜາຂອງທຽມຄວາມຫຼັງ. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ja: キャビネットの板のサイズを計算します。[Width], [Height], [Depth] は総寸法、[BoardThick] は上板、下板、側板の材料厚さ、[BackBoardThick] は背板の材料厚さです。(AI translated, please check)
remarks.ko: 캐비닛용 보드 크기를 계산합니다. [Width], [Height], [Depth]는 총 측정값이며 [BoardThick]는 상판, 하판 및 측면 보드 재료 두께이고, [BackBoardThick]는 배경 보드 재료 두께입니다. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.es: Calcula los tamaños de las tablas para un armario. [Width], [Height], [Depth] es la medida total, [BoardThick] es el grosor del material de las tablas superior, inferior y lateral, [BackBoardThick] es el grosor del material de la tabla trasera. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.fr: Calcule les dimensions des planches pour un meuble. [Width], [Height], [Depth] est la mesure totale, [BoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau des planches supérieure, inférieure et latérale, [BackBoardThick] est l'épaisseur du matériau de la planche arrière. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.de: Berechnet die Plattengrößen für einen Schrank. [Width], [Height], [Depth] ist die Gesamtmessung, [BoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der oberen, unteren und seitlichen Platte, [BackBoardThick] ist die Materialstärke der Hintergrundplatte. (AI translated, please check)
remarks.hi: कैबिनेट के लिए बोर्ड के आकार की गणना करता है। [Width], [Height], [Depth] कुल माप है, [BoardThick] टॉप, बॉटम और साइड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है, [BackBoardThick] बैकग्राउंड बोर्ड सामग्री की मोटाई है। (AI translated, please check)
remarks.ru: Рассчитывает размеры досок для шкафа. [Width], [Height], [Depth] — это общие размеры, [BoardThick] — это толщина материала верхней, нижней и боковых досок, [BackBoardThick] — это толщина материала задней доски. (AI translated, please check)
